expectations.evidence: Uses Field.Root for email, password, and terms fields
Manual onBlur handler instead of validationMode="onBlur" — reimplements validation logic
Custom useDebounce hook instead of validationMode="onChange" + validationDebounceTime
Uses plain <form> element, not Base UI Form component with errors/onClearErrors
Imports from @base-ui-components/react (wrong package name, should be @base-ui/react)
